query: What are the top AI news headlines today? Include sources.
textResponse:
Here are some of the **top AI headlines I could verify as current around today, Thursday, April 9, 2026**:

1. **Microsoft pushes enterprise AI harder with “Frontier Suite” and Agent 365**
   - Microsoft announced Wave 3 of Microsoft 365 Copilot, broader model options including Anthropic Claude and next-gen OpenAI models, plus general availability timing for Agent 365 and its new Microsoft 365 E7 “Frontier Suite.” ([blogs.microsoft.com](https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2026/03/09/introducing-the-first-frontier-suite-built-on-intelligence-trust/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Google DeepMind publishes a new framework for measuring progress toward AGI**
   - Google DeepMind said it released a paper proposing a cognitive framework for evaluating progress toward AGI, outlining 10 cognitive abilities it believes matter for general intelligence in AI systems. ([blog.google](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/measuring-agi-cognitive-framework?utm_source=openai))

3. **Google recaps a wave of March AI launches**
   - Google published a roundup of its biggest March 2026 AI updates, including Search Live expansion, broader “Personal Intelligence” access, and Gemini-related migration tools. ([blog.google](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/google-ai-updates-march-2026/?utm_source=openai))

4. **TechCrunch’s current AI coverage highlights policy, infrastructure, and labor themes**
   - TechCrunch’s AI section, crawled today, prominently features stories such as OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy and broader reporting on AI’s impact on work and infrastructure. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))

5. **OpenAI research/news remains focused on science and infrastructure**
   - OpenAI’s recent official pages highlight scientific research efforts and major infrastructure partnerships, including its science initiative and its previously announced AWS strategic partnership. ([openai.com](https://openai.com/science//?utm_source=openai))

**A quick caveat:** I wasn’t able to reliably pull a clean, comprehensive “April 9, 2026 AI headlines” list from major general-news wires in the tool results, so this is a **best verified snapshot from authoritative company blogs and current tech coverage**, not a definitive top-10 newswire digest. ([blogs.microsoft.com](https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2026/03/09/introducing-the-first-frontier-suite-built-on-intelligence-trust/?utm_source=openai))

If you want, I can do a **second pass limited to Reuters/AP/major newspapers only** and give you a cleaner **“top 5 AI headlines today”** roundup with stricter journalism-only sourcing.
